caption: A person uses a paper trimmer on a white wooden surface to cut a piece of patterned green and gold paper. The individual wears a white watch on their left wrist. In the initial sequence, the person holds the paper against the trimmer's guide, and their right hand operates the sliding blade mechanism. As the process continues, the paper is repositioned and pushed further into the trimmer to be cut. Visible on the table are various crafting supplies, including a stamp pad and a small card that reads "Thank You". A logo in the bottom left corner of the scene contains the text "Stamping Jill". The sequence shows the paper being aligned and then sliced as the person slides the cutting tool across the material.
